Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6409 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Winter Wonderland.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cb00 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $ca00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Winter Wonderland.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $CA00 which: 1. Displays the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game 2. Once the loading screen has been displayed, it then turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts
Also restored 32 bytes of data to the loading screen bitmap at $FD30 which were corrupted at the end of the original loading code by a call to the kernal RESTOR routine ($FD15).
